title: AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions!
